heading: Crafting digital experiences with precision
paragraphs: I'm a frontend developer focused on building modern web and mobile applications that are fast, accessible, and thoughtfully designed. I primarily work with Next.js, React, React Native, TypeScript, and Tailwind CSS to create responsive interfaces and smooth user experiences across platforms.

Beyond the interface, I also have experience with Node.js and PostgreSQL, giving me a solid understanding of the full stack. I value clean architecture, performance, and maintainable code, and I strive to build products that feel polished, reliable, and intuitive to use.
